note_type.description: Template note type. Box notes render before general notes on dispatches.

title.description: Optional section title shown for both general and box notes

bullet_lines.description: Bullet line items for general notes

box_content.description: Body content for box notes. Supports lightweight markup (**bold**, __underline__).

border_color.description: CSS color value for box note border

text_color.description: CSS color value for box note text

note_text.description: Legacy plain note text for backwards compatibility

priority.description: Display priority (lower = higher priority within each note type)
